codebase_shape_bulk_merge_projects.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS r(code_project_id uuid, code_repository_id uuid, project_path text, relative_path text, name text, project_type text, language text, metadata_json jsonb)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_projects (code_project_id, code_repository_id, project_path, relative_path, name, project_type, language, metadata_json) SELECT code_project_id, code_repository_id, project_path, relative_path, name, project_type, language, metadata_json FROM rows ON CONFLICT (code_repository_id, project_path) DO UPDATE SET relative_path = EXCLUDED.relative_path, name = EXCLUDED.name, project_type = EXCLUDED.project_type, language = EXCLUDED.language, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_project_id, code_repository_id, project_path
codebase_shape_bulk_merge_projects.sqlServerSql: /* SQL Server parity can materialize rows with OPENJSON when enabled. */

codebase_shape_bulk_merge_files.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS r(code_file_id uuid, code_repository_id uuid, code_project_id uuid, file_path text, relative_path text, language text, extension text, line_count integer, sha256 text, content_text text, symbol_count integer, metadata_json jsonb)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_files (code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, content_text, symbol_count, metadata_json) SELECT code_file_id, code_repository_id, code_project_id, file_path, relative_path, language, extension, line_count, sha256, content_text, symbol_count, metadata_json FROM rows ON CONFLICT (file_path) DO UPDATE SET code_repository_id = EXCLUDED.code_repository_id, code_project_id = EXCLUDED.code_project_id, relative_path = EXCLUDED.relative_path, language = EXCLUDED.language, extension = EXCLUDED.extension, line_count = EXCLUDED.line_count, sha256 = EXCLUDED.sha256, content_text = EXCLUDED.content_text, symbol_count = EXCLUDED.symbol_count, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_file_id, code_repository_id, file_path
codebase_shape_bulk_merge_files.sqlServerSql: /* SQL Server parity can materialize rows with OPENJSON when enabled. */

codebase_shape_bulk_merge_symbols.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS r(code_symbol_id uuid, code_file_id uuid, symbol_name text, qualified_name text, symbol_kind text, line_number integer, end_line_number integer, container_name text, metadata_json jsonb, symbol_hash text, signature text, visibility text, layer_code text, domain_code text, parent_symbol_id uuid, is_entry_point boolean, is_exported boolean, is_abstract boolean, enrichment_status text)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_symbols (code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status) SELECT code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name, qualified_name, symbol_kind, line_number, end_line_number, container_name, metadata_json, symbol_hash, signature, visibility, layer_code, domain_code, parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point, is_exported, is_abstract, enrichment_status FROM rows ON CONFLICT (code_file_id, symbol_name) DO UPDATE SET qualified_name = EXCLUDED.qualified_name, symbol_kind = EXCLUDED.symbol_kind, line_number = EXCLUDED.line_number, end_line_number = EXCLUDED.end_line_number, container_name = EXCLUDED.container_name, metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json, symbol_hash = EXCLUDED.symbol_hash, signature = EXCLUDED.signature, visibility = EXCLUDED.visibility, layer_code = EXCLUDED.layer_code, domain_code = EXCLUDED.domain_code, parent_symbol_id = EXCLUDED.parent_symbol_id, is_entry_point = EXCLUDED.is_entry_point, is_exported = EXCLUDED.is_exported, is_abstract = EXCLUDED.is_abstract, enrichment_status = EXCLUDED.enrichment_status RETURNING code_symbol_id, code_file_id, symbol_name
codebase_shape_bulk_merge_symbols.sqlServerSql: /* SQL Server parity can materialize rows with OPENJSON when enabled. */

codebase_shape_bulk_update_symbol_parent.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS r(code_symbol_id uuid, parent_symbol_id uuid)) UPDATE inventory.code_symbols AS target SET parent_symbol_id = rows.parent_symbol_id FROM rows WHERE rows.code_symbol_id = target.code_symbol_id
codebase_shape_bulk_update_symbol_parent.sqlServerSql: /* SQL Server parity can materialize rows with OPENJSON when enabled. */

codebase_shape_bulk_merge_relationships.postgresqlSql: WITH input AS (SELECT %s::jsonb AS rows_json), rows AS (SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset((SELECT rows_json FROM input)) AS r(code_relationship_id uuid, code_repository_id uuid, source_file_id uuid, source_symbol_id uuid, target_file_id uuid, target_symbol_id uuid, target_ref text, relationship_type text, metadata_json jsonb)) INSERT INTO inventory.code_relationships (code_relationship_id, code_repository_id, source_file_id, source_symbol_id, target_file_id, target_symbol_id, target_ref, relationship_type, metadata_json) SELECT code_relationship_id, code_repository_id, source_file_id, source_symbol_id, target_file_id, target_symbol_id, target_ref, relationship_type, metadata_json FROM rows ON CONFLICT (code_repository_id, source_file_id, source_symbol_id, target_file_id, target_symbol_id, target_ref, relationship_type) DO UPDATE SET metadata_json = EXCLUDED.metadata_json RETURNING code_relationship_id, code_repository_id
codebase_shape_bulk_merge_relationships.sqlServerSql: /* SQL Server parity can materialize rows with OPENJSON when enabled. */
